basic_details.job_title: NFDC General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Film Development Corporation (NFDC) General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website NFDC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NFDC General Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Mass Communication OR Film Studies OR Mass Media OR Journalism OR Marketing
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Mass Communication OR Film Studies OR Mass Media OR Journalism OR Marketing

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFDC General Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFDC General Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NFDC General Manager recruitment is 29th May 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Mass Communication OR Film Studies OR Mass Media OR Journalism OR Marketing to be eligible for the General Manager position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the General Manager post is 55 years. Please check the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the General Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the General Manager position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 2,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the General Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the General Manager post in the National Film Development Corporation (NFDC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NFDC General Manager recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the General Manager post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NFDC located?
faq.answer: The NFDC office is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this NFDC recruitment is ADV-59/Contractual/20/05/2026.
